query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A snow-covered rural landscape with horses standing near split-rail wooden fences that stretch across gently rolling terrain. Leafless deciduous trees cluster in the midground, and a small dark structure sits nestled among them. Heavy falling snow and thick fog obscure the background, blending the horizon and sky into a uniform pale gray and white.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A muted, faded winter landscape rendered in washed-out, nearly monochrome tones, where flat, diffuse light and oppressive low contrast eliminate shadows and visual depth across the snow-covered terrain. Horses stand near wooden fences in the foreground while leafless trees and a distant structure dissolve into dense fog and falling snow, creating a bleak scene of atmospheric distress and isolating melancholy.
